name: The Nine Golf
about: The Nine Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue in Duluth, GA, featuring world-class Trackman 4 technology for practice and play. The facility offers a range of options, including global course play, skill practice sessions, and competitive tournaments. Membership plans are available, and the venue also hosts events such as live college football game days. The simulator uses advanced radar and optics to provide accurate ball and club data.
why_golfers_like_it: World-class Trackman 4 technology for accurate simulation
Diverse range of global courses and practice options
Events like college football Saturdays enhance the experience
Membership plans offer additional free time during off-peak hours

food_and_drink.notes: Menu available with a 10% discount on all food and non-alcoholic drinks for members
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Highly accurate launch monitor using radar and high-end optics to measure club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but it offers club fitting services, suggesting they may provide clubs for fitting or lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a menu with food and non-alcoholic drinks, but there is no mention of BYOB policies for outside beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but it does mention that sessions can be booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue hosts events like college football Saturdays and offers family memberships, suggesting it is family-friendly and welcomes children.
